name: Gf Pumpkin Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Sift dry ingredients together.
3. Cream shortening and sugar until smooth.
4. Add vanilla and pumpkin, mixing well.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients and nuts, beating until combined.
6. Shape dough into 1-inch balls and place on a greased cookie sheet.
7. Press flat with a fork.
8. Bake for 9 to 12 minutes.
Note: 1 cookie represents 1 fruit/vegetable choice, 1 fat.
